meaning: n.消息,通讯,讯息,音讯,差使,广告词,预言,教训vt.通知vi.带信息
examples: I'll send you a text message.
A message is just coming through.
The broad message is the same, even if it is a slightly larger contraction than expected.
Melissa messages come with a subject header that starts "Important Message From, " followed by a name.
